Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Heeey, mind if I pop in there real quick?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Welcome! What kind of flowers are you looking for today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh, um, they're for a girl who's in the hospital right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Get-well flowers, are they? In that case, how about these ones here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}White flowers? Are you sure about that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Huh? What, is that bad? She likes the color white, so I figured...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I'm sure it will be fine as long as you have a reason! Okay, let me wrap it up for you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Uh, on second thought, I think I'll pass![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Well, sorry for the pointless detour.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}It's just... Look, I don't really get it myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I just don't really know if they're okay to buy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Huh? Well yeah, I ain't exactly rollin' in dough, but I can still afford it, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 10 25 25}Besides, it's what comes after that's the problem.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Hey, wanna go sit somewhere for a bit? I don't feel like standin' around and talkin'.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}So, the girl I'm visiting... I think I made her upset.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 10 25 25}I wanna tell her I'm sorry, but I don't even know what I did wrong.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}She told me not to come around anymore. So what am I supposed to do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}That's what you'd do if you were in my shoes?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Well, yeah. I'm sure you would be able to pull it off that way, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Time, huh... Makes more sense than goin' to see her without a plan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Right? It's like there's no right answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}It feels like I'm trapped in some kinda loop, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}No matter how motivated I get, it's gettin' me nowhere. Been that way since I played baseball.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Those hero moments where if I could just hit the ball... Man, I'd get so amped.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}Whenever it was clutch time, I always struck out. And I guess nothin's different now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Damn, way to kick a man when he's down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Buuut you're not wrong. I'm pretty hopeless, haha.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Whew, feels like I got a huge weight off my shoulders.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Didn't think the day would come when I'd be talking to you about my problems, {f 4 2}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}But I guess it's not really a secret that I got problems, huh. And besides...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I kinda hate to admit it, but the answer you give is probably the right one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Ah, crap, I'm losin' my edge! I need somethin' to get back in the groove.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Let's get katsudon at Wakatsu to wake us up! Wait, do they even have katsudon there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei didn't buy the white[n]flowers he picked out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if he's going to[n]skip visiting the hospital...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Hey! You zonin' out over there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei and I stopped by[n]Wakatsu on our way home.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0} have[n]improved after eating a healthy meal...[n]{f 1 1}
